summary: Applied ADR 0304 from the latest origin/main baseline by replaying Step-CA, OpenBao, and Windmill on top of repo version 0.177.140, re-verifying Atlas snapshot refresh and drift detection after the live runtime re-converge, confirming the seeded Windmill atlas_drift_check job end to end, and then integrating the exact-main release surfaces for repo version 0.177.141 and platform version 0.130.89.

verification.observed: make converge-step-ca env=production succeeded from the rebased ADR 0304 worktree with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=145 changed=4 failed=0 and proxmox_florin : ok=54 changed=4 failed=0.
make converge-openbao env=production succeeded from the rebased ADR 0304 worktree with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=385 changed=8 failed=0 and postgres-lv3 : ok=75 changed=1 failed=0.

make converge-windmill env=production hit a transient missing nat DOCKER chain on docker-runtime-lv3 during guest-firewall evaluation, exercised the built-in Docker recovery path, and still finished with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=384 changed=53 failed=0 rescued=1, postgres-lv3 : ok=95 changed=6 failed=0, and proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.

make atlas-validate and make atlas-lint passed immediately from the rebased tree, the first atlas-refresh-snapshots attempt timed out before the live replay, and the post-replay atlas-refresh-snapshots, atlas-validate, and atlas-drift-check commands all completed successfully with drift_count 0 across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases.
scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py against f/lv3/atlas_drift_check returned status ok with report.status clean, drift_count 0, and no published notifications.

The targeted repository slice passed with 68 tests, the final validation-runner contracts validated cleanly, agent-standards passed from the release-cut tree, and git diff --check reported no whitespace or conflict-marker defects before the mainline push.

notes: This receipt supersedes receipts/live-applies/2026-04-01-adr-0304-atlas-mainline-live-apply.json as the authoritative exact-main proof for ADR 0304.

The first current-main atlas-refresh-snapshots attempt timed out before the live replay; the successful post-replay atlas refresh and drift evidence from the same rebased tree is the authoritative latest-main verification set.
This is the exact-main receipt that justifies the platform version bump from 0.130.88 to 0.130.89 after the merged ADR 0304 workstream was replayed from the latest origin/main baseline.
